overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a muddy rural path at night. The scene features atmospheric low-light conditions with stormy skies, a wooden fence lining the left side, and dense forest ahead.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the muddy forest path with weapons sheathed on his back, heading toward the dark tree line

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence with vertical posts running along the left side of the path
wet dirt trail with visible puddles reflecting the dim ambient light
dense silhouette of pine trees forming a dark wall ahead
dark teal storm clouds covering the night sky with subtle ambient light

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks steadily along a narrow muddy path through a dark forest at night. A rustic wooden fence lines the left side while dense trees loom ahead against a stormy sky. The atmosphere is quiet and atmospheric with cool blue-green lighting typical of a stormy night in the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady camera movement along a desolate rural path that maintains a heavy, atmospheric tension under a stormy night sky. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow, muddy trail, where the cool blue-green lighting emphasizes the isolation of the wilderness. As he advances, the camera tracks his progress beside a rustic wooden fence that lines the left side of the path. The scene then pushes forward into the deepening gloom, with dense trees looming ahead and framing the horizon against the turbulent clouds.
